All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

B

BYTE - Enum constant in enum class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.TagType
Represents a single signed 8-bit Byte value.
BYTE_ARRAY - Enum constant in enum class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.TagType
Represents an array of Byte values.
ByteArrayTag - Class in me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Represents an NBT tag holding an array of byte values.
ByteArrayTag(byte[]) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.ByteArrayTag
Constructs a new unnamed tag with the specified byte array value.
ByteArrayTag(String, byte[]) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.ByteArrayTag
Constructs a new tag with the specified name and byte array value.
ByteTag - Class in me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Represents an NBT tag holding a single byte value.
ByteTag(Byte) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.ByteTag
Constructs a new unnamed tag with the specified byte value.
ByteTag(String, Byte) - Constructor for class me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags.ByteTag
Constructs a new tag with the specified name and byte value.
